ranking_reasons: same brand "PROFESSIONALS ILLINOIS P C" x3 across 3 ZIPs
networks.network_summary: Three Chicagoland GP locations all registered in NPPES under the legal name "DENTAL PROFESSIONALS OF ILLINOIS, P.C." (or close variant) — the documented friendly-PC wrapper used by Heartland Dental LLC across its Illinois-supported offices. Hillary Thull is the NPPES Authorized Official across all three NPIs, consistent with a Heartland corporate credentialing or administrative staff role rather than a dentist owner. Two locations (Oak Park 60302, Countryside 60525) are already classified dso_national / Heartland Dental in the DB. The Countryside Dental Group website (countrysidedental.com) explicitly states "supported by Heartland Dental LLC," "Orahh Care Dental Community is a brand owned by Heartland Dental LLC," and "the dental practice operates as Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C." The Oak Park location (Lifetime Smiles Dental) is confirmed Heartland/Orahh Care via whoownsmydentists.com and consumer search results. The Bloomingdale location (Flex Dental, 290 Springfield Dr) shares the same NPPES legal entity name and EIN 362736573 — a known Heartland friendly-PC EIN — placing it firmly within the same structure despite no direct Heartland disclosure found on that brand's website. Heartland Dental is PE-backed by KKR and Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan. The AO reach is a structural artifact of Heartland's operating model (one administrative AO per batch of supported PCs), not a personal multi-owner signal.
networks.owner_operator_identity: Heartland Dental LLC (national DSO/MSO operator, PE-backed by KKR); Hillary Thull is the NPPES Authorized Official — consistent with a Heartland corporate credentialing or administrative coordinator role, not a dentist owner. Consumer brands: Flex Dental (Bloomingdale), Lifetime Smiles Dental (Oak Park), Countryside Dental Group (Countryside). All operate as Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.

networks.network_summary: Three Illinois GP locations operating as "PRO DENTAL IL - CHAD WISE PC" — a friendly professional corporation (Illinois-licensed PC wrapper) for the Destiny Dental DSO platform. All 3 NPIs share Simone Wilson-Adeleke as the NPPES Authorized Official, who is a corporate credentialing/admin officer for the DSO network, NOT the dentist-owner. Destiny Dental was acquired by ProSmile Holdings LLC (a TriSpan PE-backed national DSO) in August 2024. The NPPES mailing address for NPI 1710714233 resolves to ProSmile's New Jersey corporate HQ (10 Woodbridge Center Dr Ste 520, Woodbridge, NJ). All 3 locations are correctly classified as dso_regional in the database with affiliated_dso='Destiny Dental / ProSmile'. The AO-cluster signal here is a DSO corporate administrative footprint, not a dentist multi-office ownership signal.

networks.network_summary: Familia Dental is a well-documented, PE-backed DSO founded in 2008 by Dr. Koushan H. Azad and headquartered in suburban Chicago (Schaumburg, IL). The Halifax Group recapitalized the company in April 2016, providing PE backing. All three watched-IL locations (Wheeling, Addison, Elgin) operate under the Familia Dental brand and are NPPES-registered as Familia Dental [#] LLC or Dexter Dental 3 LLC, all with Koushan Azad as authorized official. Parent_company on the Addison NPI reads '1ST FAMILY DENTAL', the legacy trade name before brand consolidation. The AO-reach signal here is fully corroborated: Azad is the DSO's founder/CEO, not merely a billing contact. All three locations are already classified dso_national in the DB, which is correct.

networks.network_summary: Three Chicagoland IL GP locations all operating as "Affordable Dentures & Implants," the franchise brand of Affordable Care LLC — the largest US tooth-replacement DSO, PE-backed by Harvest Partners since 2021 (~$2.7B acquisition from Berkshire Partners). Ben Mehta, DDS is the licensed dentist and NPPES-registered authorized official for the IL professional-corporation entities; he is the affiliated practitioner/local operator, not the ultimate corporate owner. The ownership chain is: IL practice PCs -> Affordable Care LLC (DSO platform, Raleigh NC) -> Harvest Partners (private equity). All three locations already carry dso_national classification in the database with affiliated_dso="Affordable Care." Taxonomy codes are general dentistry (122300000X, 1223G0001X, 1223P0300X); is_specialist_only=0 for all three — valid GP-denominator entries. No reclassification action needed; the AO cluster investigation fully confirms the existing database classification.
